title: Pull Sheet - AICBG
description: Anterior iliac crest bone graft harvest + intraoral grafting OR setup (two-site)
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - AICBG.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Anterior Iliac Crest Bone Graft (AICBG)

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Oral or nasal RAE per recipient site; secure tube to head wrap
- 2 g Ancef upfront (3 g Unasyn if intraoral contamination), re-dose q2h
- 1 g TXA upfront; 10 mg Decadron upfront
- Supine, arms tucked, bump under ipsilateral hip; 90 degrees head to door
- Foley with temp probe; conservative fluid resuscitation; OG tube at end
- Confirm donor side marked with surgeon before prep

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- TWO prep fields: intraoral (Peridex off field, dental syringe / 27 G) AND hip donor (chlorhexidine, separate prep table and instruments)
- 2% lidocaine with epi; 0.5% Marcaine with epi for donor-site infiltration
- Exparel 20 cc to donor site
- Hemostatics in room: bone wax, Gelfoam, Surgicel, Surgiflo
- Small JP or Penrose drain for donor site
- Abdominal binder / hip pressure dressing; ABD pads, Kerlix
- Specimen cups + formalin available if concurrent pathology

SETS
- Head and neck set (recipient site); tissue set
- Iliac crest bone graft harvest set: gouges, straight and curved osteotomes, mallet, bone curettes, periosteal elevators
- Trephine; bone mill / crusher; graft collection tray
- Implant handpiece (Bien-Air) for recipient bed preparation
- Plating module if rigid fixation of graft planned
- In room, do not open: Piezo

CONSUMABLES
- Bovie (Colorado or needle tip, set 20/20)
- Trephine bur and/or oscillating saw blade; round burs
- Bone wax; Gelfoam; Surgicel; Surgiflo
- JP drain (small) / Penrose; closed-suction bulb
- Resorbable collagen membrane / tacks if guided bone regeneration
- 24 G wire if recipient fixation needed

CLOSURE
- Donor: 0 or 2-0 Vicryl to muscle/fascia; 3-0 Vicryl deep dermal; 4-0 Monocryl subcuticular; skin glue or staples
- Oral: 3-0 Vicryl (SH); 3-0 chromic gut (SH)

title: Pull Sheet - All-on-X
description: All-on-X (full-arch implant) OR setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - All-on-X.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: All-on-X (maxilla and/or mandible)

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Nasal RAE; secure tube to head wrap
- 2 g Ancef upfront, re-dose q4h
- 10 mg Decadron upfront
- Supine, arms tucked, 90 degrees head to door
- Conservative fluid resuscitation

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Anesthetize and Peridex off field with dental syringe / 27 G
- 2% lidocaine with epi x6; 0.5% Marcaine with epi x2
- Graft: DFDBA 2 cc unopened; resorbable membrane x4 unopened
- Ophthalmic betadine x2 (prep head to clavicle)
- 2.5% hydrocortisone cream for lip swelling
- Foley with temp probe
- Exparel 10 cc at end of case; BSS at end of case
- Surgiflo x2; 1 g TXA in 500 cc NS for irrigation on field
- Jaw bra

SETS
- Implant set (e.g. Nobel Active, non-guided)
- Extraction set
- TPX: round diamond #2 and #4; 703; pineapple bur; power rasp
- Implant handpieces (straight and contra-angle)
- Nomad and computer
- Tissue set; chisel sets

CONSUMABLES
- Bovie (Colorado or needle tip, set 20/20)
- Smiley retractor
- 10 cc 2% lidocaine with epi on field; Peridex on field
- Sterile golf pencil
- Spike drills x2; 2.0 twist x2
- High and low torque wrench
- Optragate (medium and regular)

CLOSURE
- 2-0 silk (SH) x1; 3-0 Vicryl (SH) x2; 2-0 PDS (CT2) x1; 3-0 chromic (SH) x4

title: Pull Sheet - Anterior Maxilla Bone Graft
description: Anterior maxilla particulate graft (defect/cleft, piriform rim) intraoral setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Anterior Maxilla Bone Graft.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Anterior Maxilla Bone Graft

Patient / MRN / age-sex / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Local +/- IV sedation or GA per plan; oral or nasal RAE if GA
- 1% lidocaine with 1:100,000 epi for infiltration
- Peridex rinse pre-op

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Intraoral prep (Peridex), throat pack if GA
- Dental syringe / 27 G short and long needles
- Particulate allograft (DBX putty / DBM), have on hand
- Collagen or PTFE membrane; tacks/pins if GBR planned
- Specimen cup + formalin if cystic lining anticipated for path
- Hemostatics: Gelfoam, Surgicel

SETS
- Oral surgery / dentoalveolar set
- Periosteal elevators (Molt 9, Prichard), curettes (Lucas), retractors
- Implant handpiece + irrigation if recipient bed prep planned
- In room, do not open: plating/tack module

CONSUMABLES
- #15 blade x1-2
- Bovie / needle-tip cautery
- Round burs; irrigation saline
- Particulate allograft (DBX putty / DBM)
- Collagen / PTFE membrane; resorbable tacks
- Gelfoam / Surgicel

CLOSURE
- 3-0 Vicryl (SH) and/or 3-0 Monocryl; interrupted + horizontal mattress for watertight closure

title: Pull Sheet - Arthroscopy
description: TMJ arthroscopy (lysis/lavage, PRF) OR setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Arthroscopy.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: TMJ Arthroscopy

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Nasal RAE; secure tube to head wrap
- 2 g Ancef upfront (1 g if small/pediatric)
- 10 mg Decadron upfront
- Supine, arms tucked, 90 degrees head to door
- Conservative fluid resuscitation
- 20 cc blood draw upfront for PRF

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Head wrap kit (blue towels, 1 inch and 3 inch silk tape, mastisol, Tegaderm x2)
- Electrical shaver (shave in room)
- PRF centrifuge (2000 RPM x 8 min)
- Ophthalmic betadine x2 (prep head to clavicle, include tube)
- No Foley; earwick x1 (cut in half)
- 0.3 mg epinephrine in 1 L LR pressure irrigation (on field)
- Sterile IV tubing, 3-way stopcock (Luer-lock); RECK solution (ordered)

SETS
- McCain 1.8 mm arthroscopy system
- Coblator (Reflux Ultra)
- Soft tissue set; #3/#5 myringotomy suction
- Setup: LR irrigation + sterile IV tubing + 3-way stopcock
- In room, do not open: 1.9 arthroscopy system x2; meniscus mender set; 2-0 PDS (discopexy); #69 angled Beaver blade (non-disposable handle)

CONSUMABLES
- 3 cc syringe x2, 60 cc syringe x4
- 1.5 inch 22 G needle x6, sharp 18 G needle x2
- 1016 irrigation pouch/crani-drape x2, 1010 drape x2
- Suction x2 (one Frazier tip, one to 1016 drape)
- Jaw bra, fluffs (4x4)

CLOSURE
- 5-0 plain gut, steri-strips, mastisol

sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Dental Implant.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Dental Implant

Patient / MRN / age-sex / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Local +/- IV sedation or GA per plan
- 1% lidocaine with 1:100,000 epi; IAN block for mandibular sites
- Peridex rinse pre-op

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Intraoral prep (Peridex)
- Dental syringe / 27 G short and long needles
- Confirm implant system, sizes, REF/LOT staged; surgical guide if planned
- Torque wrench; cover screws / healing abutments; multi-unit abutments if screw-retained
- Document implant REF/LOT and torque value on chart

SETS
- Oral surgery / dentoalveolar set (periosteal elevator, retractors, curettes)
- Implant surgical kit (drills, depth gauges, drivers, ratchet/torque wrench)
- Implant handpiece (reduction) + irrigation tubing

CONSUMABLES
- #15 blade
- Sequential implant drills (per system); round/profiling diamond bur
- Sterile saline irrigation
- Implant fixture(s) + cover screw / healing abutment + abutment
- Gelfoam / collagen plug if needed

CLOSURE
- 3-0 Vicryl or 3-0 chromic gut

sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Endobrow Blepharoplasty.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Endobrow Lift, Upper/Lower Blepharoplasty, Canthopexy

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Oral RAE; secure tube to chest
- 2 g Ancef upfront
- 10 mg Decadron upfront
- 180-degree turn, head to wall
- Conservative fluid resuscitation

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Anesthetize off field with dental syringe / 27 G
- Ophthalmic betadine x2 (hair to clavicle)
- 2% lidocaine with epi x6; 0.5% Marcaine with epi x2
- Clear corneal shields (with or without squeegee)
- Erythromycin or Tobradex
- Tumescent with Klein pump
- 20 G and 18 G 4-inch spinal needles
- BSS at end of case
- Exparel in 10 cc syringe with 26 G needle
- On field: 10 cc syringe and 1 cc syringes

SETS
- Endobrow scope set (Hopkins 20 degree, 4 mm, 18 cm; Storz or equivalent)
- Endobrow sheath (Storz 50200ES or equivalent)
- Endo brow lift instrument set
- Facelift / blepharoplasty set (key items: Desmarres, Jaeger, Adson-Brown)
- Endoscope 30 degree 5 mm 17.5 cm with sheath
- Camera (Image 1 S or equivalent), light cord, scope tower
- Endotine set (unopened)

CONSUMABLES
- Endotine drill
- Bipolar (Silverglide); Bovie (Colorado or needle tip)
- #15 blade; #9 Molt periosteal elevators
- Wire-passing bur (canthopexy)

CLOSURE
- 0-0 Nurolon (CT-1) x2; 6-0 Prolene; 6-0 plain gut; skin staples

bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Excisional Biopsy / Soft-tissue Excision

- Local infiltration (lidocaine with epi) for clinic; MAC / GA per case if OR

- 4x4 gauze
- Surgical marking pen

CLOSURE
- 3-0 / 4-0 chromic gut or Vicryl (interrupted or running)
- Orientation marking suture (e.g., short tag at one margin) per surgeon

- In room, do not open: Surgiflo x2

- Medium and large Liga clips available in room

title: Pull Sheet - Incision and Drainage
description: Incision and drainage of fascial space infection setup (clinic or OR; culture + Penrose drain)
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Incision and Drainage.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Incision and Drainage

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Local infiltration for clinic; GA (consider nasal/oral RAE) if OR for deep-space drainage and source-control extraction
- Empiric IV antibiotics per surgeon (e.g., Unasyn) before/at incision
- Confirm involved side and space with surgeon before prep

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- 1% lidocaine with 1:100,000 epinephrine for subdermal infiltration
- Standard skin prep (chlorhexidine) over and below mandibular border
- Culture swab(s) for Gram stain and aerobic AND anaerobic culture and sensitivity
- Sterile container for fluid aspirate if applicable
- Sterile saline / bulb or piston syringe for copious irrigation
- 4x4 gauze and dressing supplies for drain site

SETS
- Minor soft-tissue / oral surgery set
- Curved hemostats (for blunt space exploration)
- Extraction / exodontia set if offending tooth removed for source control

CONSUMABLES
- #15 blade
- Bovie / cautery for hemostasis
- 0.25 inch Penrose drain
- Sterile saline for irrigation
- Sterile 4x4 dressing

CLOSURE
- 2-0 nylon to secure Penrose drain to skin
- Wound left open / loosely approximated for continued drainage per surgeon

bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Mandibular Resection (Marginal / Segmental) + Reconstruction Plate

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Confirm airway plan: nasal RAE vs planned tracheostomy; secure tube to head wrap
- 3 g Unasyn upfront, re-dose q2h
- 1 g TXA upfront; 10 mg Decadron upfront
- Supine, arms tucked, shoulder roll; 90 degrees head to door

- Conservative fluid resuscitation; OG tube at end
- Guiding elastics vs MMF per reconstruction plan

- Peridex intraoral off field (dental syringe / 27 G); chlorhexidine/betadine extraoral neck prep
- 2% lidocaine with epi; 0.5% Marcaine with epi
- Exparel 20 cc; BSS at end of case
- SPECIMEN: fresh specimen for frozen-section margins; formalin for permanent; orient with marking sutures/tags per surgeon
- Surgiflo, bone wax, Surgicel available
- JP drain(s); neck dressing
- If patient-specific (custom) plate planned: confirm plate and guides delivered and sterile before incision

SETS
- Head and neck set; tissue set
- Mandible resection set; reciprocating and sagittal saw
- Mandible plating module + reconstruction plate set (2.0 / 2.4 locking recon plate)
- Custom / patient-specific plate and cutting guides if pre-planned
- IMF set; Piezo; TPX
- In room, do not open: chisel sets

CONSUMABLES
- Bovie (Colorado or needle tip, set 20/20)
- Reciprocating saw blades; round and fissure burs
- Reconstruction plate + locking screws (confirm system and screw lengths)
- 24 G wire; medium and large Liga clips available
- Specimen cups + formalin; frozen-section supplies

CLOSURE
- 3-0 Vicryl (SH); 3-0 chromic gut (SH) intraoral
- 4-0 Monocryl subcuticular; 3-0 nylon or staples for neck

title: Pull Sheet - ORIF Facial Trauma
description: ORIF facial fractures (mandible / Le Fort / ZMC / NOE / orbital) and MMF OR setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - ORIF Facial Trauma.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: ORIF Facial Trauma (mandible / midface / orbit)

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.


ANESTHESIA
- Nasal RAE (oral RAE if nasal contraindicated); secure tube, confirm route with surgeon
- Antibiotics: cefazolin (or per allergy/protocol) upfront, re-dose q4h; add metronidazole for grossly contaminated/odontogenic
- Tetanus status confirmed/updated
- Supine, arms tucked, 90 degrees head to door
- Conservative fluids; consider TXA per surgeon

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Local on field: 2% lidocaine with epi; 0.5% Marcaine with epi
- Prep: per region (oral Peridex; periorbital ophthalmic betadine; skin chlorhexidine)
- Throat pack; bite blocks; corneal shields + lubricant for periorbital cases
- Exparel available; antibiotic irrigation per surgeon
- In room, do not open until requested: plating systems, bone graft/substitute

INSTRUMENTS / EQUIPMENT
- Oral/maxillofacial fracture tray; periosteal elevators, bone reduction forceps, Dingman or Mayo gag
- IMF: arch bars OR IMF screws + 24-gauge wire + wire instruments + heavy guiding elastics
- Transbuccal trocar set (posterior body/angle)
- Plating systems (confirm vendor): load-bearing recon + load-sharing mini/micro; orbital floor plate/mesh for floor cases
- Drill/handpiece with irrigation; nerve stimulator/monitor if facial nerve at risk
- Headlight; suction; bipolar/monopolar cautery

IMPLANTS / HARDWARE
- Plates/screws (sizes per fracture pattern); orbital floor implant (stock or patient-specific) for floor cases
- Log manufacturer / size / lot for each implant placed

MEDICATIONS / OTHER
- Afrin-soaked pledgets for nasal/midface
- Hemostatics available (do not open): Surgiflo, bone wax, Gelfoam/thrombin
- Drain if planned; head wrap/dressing

title: Pull Sheet - Orthognathic
description: Le Fort / BSSO / genioplasty (orthognathic) OR setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Orthognathic.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Orthognathic (Le Fort, BSSO, genioplasty)

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Nasal RAE; secure tube to head wrap
- 3 g Unasyn upfront, re-dose q2h x3, then Ancef
- 1 g TXA upfront; 10 mg Decadron upfront
- Supine, arms tucked, 90 degrees head to door
- Control MAP ~60-70 during Le Fort down-fracture (1-1.5 h into case); 15 min notice given
- Conservative fluid resuscitation
- In guiding elastics at end of case, no MMF planned (heavy elastics available)

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Anesthetize and Peridex off field with dental syringe / 27 G
- 2% lidocaine with epi x6; 0.5% Marcaine with epi x2
- Ophthalmic betadine x2 (prep head to clavicle)
- 2.5% hydrocortisone cream for lip swelling
- Foley with temp probe
- Exparel 20 cc; BSS at end of case
- Afrin-soaked pledgets on field
- 20 cc 2% lidocaine with epi on field
- 1 g TXA in 500 cc NS for irrigation on field; Peridex on field for splints
- Jaw bra; heavy guiding elastics
- In room, do not open: Surgiflo x2; BMP; bone putty x2

SETS
- Orthognathic set (KLS or Synthes)
- Maxilla and mandible plating module
- Custom hardware
- TPX: thick and thin recip blades x4 each
- Piezo with straight attachment
- Tissue set; chisel sets
- In room, do not open: mandible trauma set

CONSUMABLES
- Bovie (Colorado or needle tip, set 20/20)
- Round diamond #2 and #4; 703; pineapple bur; power rasp
- IMF screws / arch bars per plan
- 24 G wire; bone hook

CLOSURE
- 3-0 Vicryl (SH); 3-0 chromic gut (SH); 4-0 Vicryl

title: Pull Sheet - Otoplasty
description: Bilateral otoplasty (Mustarde + conchal setback/excision) OR setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Otoplasty.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Otoplasty

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Oral RAE; secure tube to head wrap; both ears in field
- 10 mg Decadron upfront; antibiotics per surgeon preference
- Supine, arms tucked, 180 degrees (head to anesthesia)
- Prep and drape both ears + postauricular regions

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Surgical marking pen; ruler / calipers
- 2% lidocaine with 1:100,000 epinephrine; control syringe / 27 G
- 30 G hypodermic needles (cartilage marking / suture passing)
- Bilateral case: confirm both ears prepped

SETS
- Plastics / fine soft tissue set (fine scissors, skin hooks, Adson-Brown forceps, needle drivers)
- Caliper / ruler
- Bipolar cautery; needle/Colorado tip Bovie

CONSUMABLES
- 15 blade
- Bovie (needle or Colorado tip); bipolar
- 30 G needles
- Xeroform gauze, Blu-mousse / impression material (conchal bowl bolster)
- Barton headwrap / head dressing, fluffs, Kerlix
- Copious normal saline irrigation

CLOSURE
- 4-0 Mersilene (Mustarde antihelical mattress sutures)
- 3-0 Vicryl (subperichondrial to mastoid fascia; subcutaneous)
- 5-0 plain gut (running skin; leave apex open for drainage)

- Surgical marking pen; ruler / calipers
- Headlight; 0/30 degree nasal endoscope, tower, light cord (endoscopic septal work)

SETS
- Septorhinoplasty / rhinoplasty instrument set (Cottle elevators, septal scissors, Takahashi forceps, septal rongeur, nasal speculum, bayonet forceps)

- Cartilage crusher / morselizer; graft board

- Bipolar cautery; needle/Colorado tip Bovie

CONSUMABLES
- 15 blade; 11 blade
- Bovie tip; bipolar
- Gelfoam (septoplasty site)
- Doyle / silicone nasal splints; external nasal splint (Denver / thermoplastic / cast)
- Afrin / pledgets, 4x4 gauze, mustache / drip dressing

bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Sialolithotomy (Wharton Duct)

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- GA via oral/nasal RAE preferred (sialendoscopy + transoral dissection); local infiltration as adjunct
- Confirm involved side (R/L Wharton duct) with surgeon before prep

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- 2% lidocaine with 1:100,000 epinephrine; dental syringe / 27 G
- Peridex / intraoral prep (off field)
- Bite block / mouth prop, cheek retractors, headlight
- Lacrimal probes and salivary duct dilator set (graduated)
- Sialendoscopy tower and scope set if available (scope, stone basket/grasper, irrigation)
- Warm saline for ductal irrigation; sterile IV tubing for scope irrigation
- Specimen cup with 10% formalin for stone(s); permanent pathology requisition

SETS
- Minor / fine intraoral soft-tissue set (fine needle holder, Adson forceps, fine scissors)
- Molt elevators / curved hemostats for blunt ductal dissection
- Lacrimal probe and duct dilator set
- In room if available, do not open: sialendoscopy set

CONSUMABLES
- Bovie / needle-tip cautery for mucosal incision and hemostasis
- Frazier suction tip
- Sterile saline for copious irrigation
- 4x4 gauze

CLOSURE
- 3-0 chromic gut, interrupted, loose reapproximation of floor-of-mouth mucosa to allow drainage
- Duct marsupialized / left open per surgeon

title: Pull Sheet - Submandibular Gland Reduction
description: Partial superficial submandibular gland resection (neck contour) OR setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Submandibular Gland Reduction.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Submandibular Gland Reduction

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Oral RAE; secure tube; neck in field, neck extended
- 10 mg Decadron upfront; antibiotics per surgeon preference
- Supine, arms tucked, shoulder roll, 180 degrees (head to anesthesia)
- AVOID long-acting paralytics after intubation (nerve monitoring of marginal mandibular branch)
- Prep and drape submental + bilateral submandibular regions to clavicles

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Surgical marking pen
- 2% lidocaine with 1:100,000 epinephrine
- Nerve stimulator / facial nerve monitor (marginal mandibular branch) per surgeon
- Lighted retractor / fiberoptic retractor + light source
- Specimen cups + formalin (gland tissue to pathology)

SETS
- Neck / facelift soft tissue set (lighted retractors, fine scissors, Brown-Adson forceps, needle drivers)
- LigaSure / vessel-sealing device (confirm handpiece + generator)
- Bipolar cautery; needle/Colorado tip Bovie

CONSUMABLES
- 15 blade
- LigaSure handpiece; bovie tip; bipolar
- Closed-suction drain (small JP) per surgeon
- Neck compression garment / chin strap, fluffs, tape
- Copious normal saline irrigation; suction tubing

CLOSURE
- 3-0 / 4-0 Vicryl (platysma / deep layers)
- 4-0 Vicryl deep dermal; 5-0 plain gut or 6-0 nylon skin

title: Pull Sheet - Submental Liposuction
description: Submental liposuction (tumescent +/- Vaser) office/clinic setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Submental Liposuction.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Submental Liposuction

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Surgical marking pen (mark in upright position pre-op)
- Tumescent solution (e.g. NS/LR with lidocaine + epinephrine; confirm recipe with surgeon)
- Infiltration cannula + pump or syringe; control syringe / 27 G for entry points
- Chlorhexidine prep; drape submental + anterior neck
- Photography setup (pre/post)

SETS / EQUIPMENT
- Liposuction aspirator / suction source + tubing and canister
- Liposuction cannulas (assorted, e.g. 2-3 mm; confirm sizes with surgeon)
- Vaser / ultrasonic emulsification handpiece + probe (if used)
- Tumescent infiltration cannula

CONSUMABLES
- 11 blade (stab incisions: submental + bilateral prelobular)
- Tumescent solution, infiltration tubing
- 4x4 gauze, fluffs
- Neck compression garment / chin strap
- Suction tubing, canister

CLOSURE
- 5-0 plain gut or 6-0 nylon (stab incisions), or leave open for drainage per surgeon
- Compression garment applied immediately

title: Pull Sheet - Surgical Extraction (impacted)
description: Surgical extraction of impacted tooth (flap, bone removal, sectioning) clinic setup under local +/- sedation
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - Surgical Extraction (impacted).md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: Surgical Extraction (impacted)

Patient / MRN / age-sex / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- Local +/- IV sedation per plan
- 1% lidocaine with 1:100,000 epi; IAN block for mandibular teeth

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Intraoral prep (Peridex)
- Dental syringe / 27 G short and long needles
- Surgical handpiece + irrigation; bite block
- Specimen cup + formalin if follicle/lesion submitted for path

SETS
- Oral surgery / dentoalveolar set (periosteal elevator, straight + angled elevators, forceps, curettes, rongeur, retractors)

CONSUMABLES
- #15 blade
- 702 fissure bur + round bur; irrigation saline
- Gelfoam if needed

CLOSURE
- 3-0 Vicryl (re-suspend papilla)

title: Pull Sheet - TMJ Arthrocentesis
description: TMJ arthrocentesis (needle lavage, no scope) setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - TMJ Arthrocentesis.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: TMJ Arthrocentesis

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.

ANESTHESIA
- GA via nasal RAE / IV sedation / local per case
- Supine; confirm involved side (R/L) with surgeon before prep

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Preauricular prep; mark canthal-tragal line and articular fossa landmarks
- Local anesthetic for puncture sites (lidocaine with epi)
- Two 1 L bags Lactated Ringer's for lavage
- Intra-articular medication if ordered (e.g., corticosteroid / hyaluronate) drawn into syringe

SETS
- Minor / soft-tissue set (no arthroscopy system required)

CONSUMABLES
- Two large-bore needles (18-19 G) for inflow/outflow
- 3 cc syringe x2; 10-20 cc syringes for lavage
- Sterile saline / LR per above
- 4x4 gauze for manual pressure

CLOSURE
- None (no incision, no sutures); adhesive bandage to puncture sites

title: Pull Sheet - TMJ Total Joint Replacement
description: TMJ total joint replacement (stock or custom alloplastic prosthesis) OR setup
sourcePath: Note Templates/Pull Sheets/Pull Sheet - TMJ Total Joint Replacement.md
bodyTemplate:
PULL SHEET: TMJ Total Joint Replacement (stock / custom)

Patient / MRN / age-sex / ASA / allergies: complete on the printed sheet.


ANESTHESIA
- Nasal RAE; secure tube clear of the preauricular/endaural fields
- Antibiotics: cefazolin upfront (vancomycin if MRSA risk/allergy), re-dose per duration; prosthesis prophylaxis per protocol
- Supine, head turned/draped for bilateral access; both ears and abdomen in field
- Foley for long case

NURSE / CIRCULATOR
- Prep: face/ears, oral cavity (IMF), and abdomen (fat graft donor) - separate prep sets
- IMF screws + 24-gauge wire (intraoperative MMF)
- Vancomycin irrigation solution for joint sites and external auditory canals
- Exparel available
- Confirm CUSTOM: patient-specific prosthesis kit + guides opened only after surgeon verifies patient match
- In room, do not open until requested: prosthesis components, abdominal fat closure set

INSTRUMENTS / EQUIPMENT
- TMJ/preauricular tray; condylectomy instruments; power rasp/burs with irrigation
- Drill/screwdriver set matched to the prosthesis system
- STOCK: stock fossa + condylar component sizers/trials
- CUSTOM: patient-specific fossa + ramal cut guide + predictive drill guide
- Nerve monitor (facial nerve); headlight; bipolar/monopolar cautery; microscope/loupes
- Abdominal fat harvest tray

IMPLANTS / HARDWARE
- Fossa + condylar components (stock sizes available, or the patient-specific set)
- Screws: stock = bicortical condylar (sizes); custom = monocortical fossa (pre-planned lengths)
- Log manufacturer / component sizes / screw counts+lengths / lot numbers

MEDICATIONS / OTHER
- Hemostatics available (do not open): bone wax, Gelfoam/thrombin
- Prosthesis/implant card for the patient at discharge
- Drain if planned; head wrap
